title: Fix admin login — remove admin token URL requirement

requirements.text: Fix the Admin Login page so that it no longer requires an admin token to be present in the URL before allowing login. The error message 'Admin token not configured. Please access the admin panel via the correct URL with the admin token.' must be removed. The admin login flow must work by simply navigating to /admin and submitting valid credentials (email: hiteshmodi2007@gmail.com, password: Hitesh1234@) without any URL token prerequisite. Remove or bypass any token-presence check that blocks the login form submission.

quotes: Admin token not configured. Please access the admin panel via the correct URL with the admin token.

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin shows the login form without any error message pre-displayed
Submitting email 'hiteshmodi2007@gmail.com' and password 'Hitesh1234@' successfully authenticates and redirects to /admin/dashboard
No 'Admin token not configured' error appears at any point during normal login
The adminLogin mutation is called directly on form submit without a token gate check

requirements.text: Audit the useAdminActor hook and useQueries adminLogin mutation to ensure the admin actor is initialized correctly without depending on a URL-based token. The admin session must be established using only the credentials returned from the backend adminLogin call. After a successful adminLogin, the admin actor must be ready to make authenticated calls (e.g., addCar) without requiring a separately injected URL token.
acceptanceCriteria: The adminLogin mutation succeeds with correct credentials and stores the session appropriately
After login, admin operations like addCar work without a 'token not configured' error
The useAdminActor or equivalent hook initializes the actor using the stored session, not a URL parameter

constraints: Do not change the hardcoded admin credentials in the backend (email: hiteshmodi2007@gmail.com, password: Hitesh1234@)
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Changing the backend adminLogin function signature or credentials
Adding Internet Identity or third-party authentication
